game_name: Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City

danger_signals.visual_form: Generic platform game enemies with simple AI
danger_signals.meaning: Hostile entities that must be avoided or defeated to progress
Progression barriers that indicate danger zones ahead or restricted areas
Spatial confusion and disorientation indicating hazardous navigation challenges
World state of active threat—All-Star players held captive by antagonist

safety_signals.visual_form: Interactive basket objects activatable via slam dunk
safety_signals.meaning: Restorative or enhancement resources that provide temporary advantage

safety_signals.visual_form: Save points activated by slam dunk mechanic
safety_signals.meaning: Progress anchors indicating safe zones and respawn locations
Progression enablers that unlock safe passage and rescue operations

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Level design centered around basketball court aesthetics and urban Chicago setting
Kidnapping locations and containment areas where All-Star players are held
Scattered rescue points throughout level progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Multiple rescue missions and imprisoned allies positioned throughout levels
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must navigate hostile environments to locate and free teammates before time constraint expires

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Increasing danger as mad scientist's lair deepens
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Progressive level complexity with more complex mazes and varied enemy placements
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy encounters escalate in frequency; maze difficulty increases with depth progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Windy City background aesthetics showing city infrastructure as battleground
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Platforming hazards integrated into urban environment—building structures, urban obstacles

environmental_storytelling.example: Scattered teammate locations communicate ongoing kidnapping narrative and establish rescue mission pacing
Increasingly complex level layouts signal deepening into antagonist's domain and rising danger
Chicago-themed visuals establish legitimacy of basketball protagonist and real-world connection to game world
Locked doors signal restricted areas and create spatial narrative of invasion/occupation by antagonist

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Uses varied basketball-based attacks (freeze ball, bomb ball) and slam dunk mechanics to combat enemies and unlock progression
Simple AI-driven movement patterns indicating basic threat level; predictable engagement patterns
Static positioning at rescue points awaiting player intervention—visual markers of objective completion
Operates through environment design and enemy minions; presence felt through level structure and kidnapping setup rather than direct confrontation until endgame

notes: This game operates within a sports-licensed platformer paradigm where basketball mechanics (ball types, slam dunk) serve as primary interaction verbs. World-state communication relies heavily on objective positioning (rescue missions) rather than environmental hazard visualization. The 'Windy City' setting provides thematic grounding but appears secondary to gameplay mechanics. Faction dynamics are minimal—binary hero/villain structure with allies as collectible objectives rather than active participants. Visual communication of danger is implicit (enemy presence) rather than explicit (environmental hazard telegraphing). The game's design philosophy treats the basketball license as both thematic wrapper and mechanical core.
sources_used: wikipedia—Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City
